script_text: A detective enters an old archive room.
description: Wide shot. A lone detective, silhouetted against a dimly lit doorway, steps into a vast, dust-filled archive room. High contrast, deep shadows, cinematic noir style. Motes of dust catch the faint light from unseen windows.
prompt: cinematic noir, moody lighting. Wide shot. A lone detective, silhouetted against a dimly lit doorway, steps into a vast, dust-filled archive room. High contrast, deep shadows, cinematic noir style. Motes of dust catch the faint light from unseen windows.. Characters: Detective. Location: Old Archive Room. Continuity: previous context: Start of video; next context: Medium tracking shot. The detective walks slowly down a narrow aisle between towering, dusty wooden shelves. Backlit dust motes dance in the air around her. Her face is partially obscured by shadow, reflecting the moody noir aesthetic.. Duration: 6 seconds. Camera: cinematic, stable, coherent, smooth motion.
